name: Throwing Knives
flavor: A matched set of balanced blades, drawn and released in the same motion — the baseline knife every circus performer learns to spin before they learn anything flashier.

parryProfile.note: A knife held in hand can parry modestly — better than bare fists, worse than a dueling blade. Once thrown it has left your hand, so you simply have nothing in that hand to parry with (the empty-hands case). How many knives a Juggler still holds is governed by the Juggler's engine.
